organization.name: Afghan Women’s Organization, AWO Scarborough
organization.description: The AWO provides inclusive settlement and integration services to all newcomers and refugees. They offer a variety of services.
organization.address: 2555 Eglinton Ave E, Suite 211, Toronto, ON, M1K 5J1, Canada

requirements.eligibility: Newcomers with a focus on women, their families, refugees and people who have experienced war or persecution
requirements.accessibility_info: Wheelchair accessible; parking lot at rear.
